item.title: “Aggressive” Bruno’s 1-month Transformation 💫 It’s so hard to believe that this is the same cat I brought home. The first few weeks with Bruno were overwhelming. I felt hopeless at times. Even with my experience with feral & aggressive cats, Bruno has bee

item.title: Lieutenant Dani had her splints removed today and as you can see… it’s going to take some getting used to. But nothing gets in this girl’s way and she will adapt to whatever challenges she meets. #kitten #cat #manxsyndrome #catsoftiktok #cats

item.title: EDIT: I rescued this kitten. He’s a foster. He was the last one of the litter left. I’m well aware kittens do better in pairs. It’s why i have 6 of my own. I’m actively working on trying to find him a companion | safe to say he enjoyed
item.description: By @malpluscats: EDIT: I rescued this kitten. He’s a foster. He was the last one of the litter left. I’m well aware kittens do better in pairs. It’s why i have 6 of my own. I’m actively working on trying to find him a companion | safe to say he enjoyed

item.title: This list is probably not even half of all that i work on desensitizing them to on a daily basis 😅 I’m going to make a video with some tips soon because I’ve had a lot of people ask! 🤍 #kittens
